theme.en: AI Capacity Becomes an Ecosystem Constraint
theme.zh: AI产能成为全产业链约束

dek.en: TSMC still sees a long path to satisfying AI-chip demand, while NVIDIA and SK hynix deepen memory co-development and governments confront the infrastructure and trade rules around expansion. Strong earnings and a buoyant Cerebras debut show that capital remains available, but execution now depends on the entire semiconductor stack.
dek.zh: 台积电认为AI芯片需求仍需较长时间才能得到充分满足，NVIDIA与SK hynix则加深存储协同开发，各国也在应对扩产所需的基础设施与贸易规则。Broadcom业绩强劲、Cerebras上市受捧，说明资本仍在涌入，但落地已取决于整条半导体产业链。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Computex Shows That Every Systems Roadmap Is Now an AI Roadmap
title.zh: Computex显示系统路线图全面转向AI

summary.en: AI hardware dominated this year's Computex coverage across servers, PCs, networking, and component suppliers. The breadth matters because accelerator demand is no longer isolated to GPU vendors; it is shaping platform design and procurement across the systems industry.
summary.zh: 今年Computex的服务器、PC、网络与零部件展示几乎都由AI硬件主导。其重要性在于，加速器需求已不再局限于GPU厂商，而是在重塑整个系统产业的产品设计与采购方向。

title.en: RTX Spark Die Analysis Finds Modified Cortex-X925 Cores
title.zh: RTX Spark芯片分析发现改版Cortex-X925核心

summary.en: A die analysis indicates that NVIDIA's RTX Spark uses altered Cortex-X925 CPU cores with attributes associated with MediaTek's Dimensity 9400 and 9500. The changes appear aimed at PC-class workloads, illustrating how AI systems increasingly require customized CPU companions rather than unchanged mobile IP.
summary.zh: 芯片分析显示，NVIDIA RTX Spark采用经过调整的Cortex-X925 CPU核心，并结合了MediaTek Dimensity 9400与9500的部分特征。这些改动似乎面向PC级负载，说明AI系统越来越需要定制化CPU配套，而非直接沿用移动端IP。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: TSMC Says Fully Meeting AI-Chip Demand Will Take Time
title.zh: 台积电称满足全部AI芯片需求仍需时日

summary.en: TSMC's chief executive said it will be a long time before the company can fully meet demand for AI chips. The comment keeps advanced-node wafer capacity and packaging availability at the center of the AI supply outlook, despite the industry's aggressive expansion plans.
summary.zh: 台积电首席执行官表示，公司要完全满足AI芯片需求仍需很长时间。即使产业正在积极扩产，先进制程晶圆产能与封装能力仍将是AI供应前景的核心约束。

title.en: Ready-Mix Truck Halt Disrupts South Korean Semiconductor Sites
title.zh: 预拌混凝土运输停摆冲击韩国半导体工地

summary.en: A halt involving ready-mix concrete trucks in South Korea's capital region is disrupting semiconductor construction sites. The incident highlights a less visible expansion risk: new fabs depend on local construction logistics and labor continuity as much as on lithography tools and process technology.
summary.zh: 韩国首都圈预拌混凝土运输停摆，已对半导体建设工地造成影响。事件凸显了一个较少被关注的扩产风险：新晶圆厂不仅依赖光刻设备与工艺技术，也依赖本地施工物流和劳动力的连续性。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: NVIDIA and SK hynix Form Multiyear AI-Memory Partnership
title.zh: NVIDIA与SK hynix建立多年AI存储合作

summary.en: NVIDIA and SK hynix announced a multiyear technology partnership to advance memory for AI factories. Earlier and deeper coordination between an accelerator platform owner and a leading memory supplier can tighten product roadmaps and reduce integration risk as bandwidth and capacity become system-level bottlenecks.
summary.zh: NVIDIA与SK hynix宣布建立多年技术合作，共同推进面向AI工厂的存储技术。加速器平台厂商与头部存储供应商更早、更深入地协同，有助于收紧产品路线图并降低集成风险，因为带宽与容量正成为系统级瓶颈。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: New U.S.-China Chip Curbs Raise the Stakes for Lam Research
title.zh: 美中芯片新限制加大Lam Research风险

summary.en: New U.S. restrictions on chip-related trade with China are renewing scrutiny of Lam Research's exposure to the market. For equipment suppliers, tighter controls can affect not only near-term sales but also service revenue, product configurations, and the pace at which Chinese fabs add capacity.
summary.zh: 美国针对中国芯片相关贸易的新限制，再度引发市场对Lam Research中国业务敞口的关注。对设备供应商而言，更严格的管制不仅会影响近期销售，还可能波及服务收入、产品配置以及中国晶圆厂扩产速度。

title.en: SIA Seeks Harmonized Semiconductor Rules Across North America
title.zh: SIA呼吁统一北美半导体监管规则

summary.en: The Semiconductor Industry Association is calling for greater harmonization of semiconductor regulations across North America. More consistent rules could reduce compliance friction for supply chains spanning the United States, Canada, and Mexico, especially as regional manufacturing incentives encourage cross-border investment.
summary.zh: 美国半导体行业协会呼吁在北美范围内提高半导体监管规则的一致性。随着区域制造激励推动跨境投资，更统一的制度有望减少美国、加拿大和墨西哥之间供应链的合规摩擦。

title.en: Thailand's SiamAI Denies Diverting U.S. AI Servers to China
title.zh: 泰国SiamAI否认向中国转运美国AI服务器

summary.en: Thailand's SiamAI denied exporting U.S.-origin AI servers to China. The denial underscores the growing enforcement focus on transshipment routes, where cloud operators and regional distributors face pressure to document end users and comply with expanding accelerator export controls.
summary.zh: 泰国SiamAI否认将美国来源的AI服务器出口至中国。此事凸显执法部门正更加关注转运路径，云服务商与区域分销商面临更大压力，需要证明最终用户并遵守不断扩大的加速器出口管制。

title.en: Earnings & Markets
title.zh: 财报与市场

title.en: Broadcom Shares Drop Despite an Earnings and Guidance Beat
title.zh: Broadcom业绩与指引超预期但股价下跌

summary.en: Broadcom shares fell sharply even though its fiscal second-quarter results and guidance exceeded Wall Street forecasts. The reaction suggests that expectations embedded in AI-linked semiconductor valuations remain demanding, leaving little room for results that are strong but do not materially reset the growth outlook.
summary.zh: Broadcom股价大幅下跌，尽管其第二财季业绩和指引均超过华尔街预期。市场反应表明，AI相关半导体公司的估值已计入较高预期，即使业绩强劲，若不足以显著上调增长前景，仍可能难以获得正面反馈。

title.en: Challengers
title.zh: 挑战者

title.en: Cerebras Surges in Its Nasdaq Debut
title.zh: Cerebras纳斯达克首秀大涨

summary.en: Cerebras shares surged after the AI-chip company's Nasdaq debut. A strong reception gives the wafer-scale accelerator specialist public-market capital and valuation visibility, while providing a test of investor appetite for AI hardware companies outside the dominant GPU ecosystem.
summary.zh: AI芯片公司Cerebras在纳斯达克上市后股价大涨。强劲的市场反应为这家晶圆级加速器厂商带来公开市场融资与估值窗口，也检验了投资者对主流GPU生态之外AI硬件公司的兴趣。

theme.en: Efficiency Moves From Models Into Systems
theme.zh: 效率优化从模型延伸至系统

dek.en: This week's work attacks cost at several layers: measured 65 nm edge-AI chips, one-pass EDA optimization, sparse expert designs, and scheduling for constrained inference backends. The strongest results pair algorithmic efficiency with implementation details that expose where latency, memory, and robustness are actually won.
dek.zh: 本周研究从多个层面压低成本：实测65 nm边缘AI芯片、单次前向的EDA优化、稀疏专家结构，以及面向受限推理后端的调度。最有价值的成果把算法效率与实现细节结合起来，明确展示延迟、内存和鲁棒性究竟从何处获得改善。

title.en: Circuits, Architecture & Reliability
title.zh: 电路、架构与可靠性

title.en: A 65 nm Hypoglycemia Forecasting Engine at 11.3 nJ per Inference
title.zh: 单次推理11.3 nJ的65 nm低血糖预测芯片

papers.authors: B. Cheng, J. Liu, P. Ren, et al.

summary.en: The authors fabricated a 65 nm probabilistic decision-tree engine that performs 30-minute hypoglycemia forecasting at 11.3 nJ per inference and reports an F1 score of 0.825. A hybrid exact-and-sampling architecture supports trees up to depth 12, while an on-chip RISC-V core manages a reconfigurable node array. Reported robustness to sensor noise and missing data improves by 4.1x to 16.1x over conventional tree baselines, making reliability rather than raw throughput the central contribution.
summary.zh: 研究团队采用65 nm工艺流片了一款概率决策树引擎，用于提前30分钟预测低血糖，单次推理能耗为11.3 nJ，F1分数达到0.825。芯片以精确计算与采样混合架构支持最大深度12的树，并由片上RISC-V核心管理可重构节点阵列。相较传统决策树基线，其对传感器噪声和数据缺失的鲁棒性提高4.1至16.1倍，核心贡献更偏向可靠性而非单纯吞吐率。

title.en: A 65 nm Bayesian Compute-in-Memory Engine for Skin-Lesion Screening
title.zh: 面向皮肤病变筛查的65 nm贝叶斯存算一体引擎

papers.authors: S. Davis, L. Pei, J. Liu, et al.

summary.en: This 65 nm compute-in-memory chip performs multimodal Bayesian inference for fully on-device skin-lesion screening. Its calibration-free Gaussian random-number generator reaches 16.3 fJ per sample and 168.6 GSa/s/mm², while mixture-of-Gaussian sampling improves equal-risk coverage by 1.4x and process-variation resilience by 5.5x. The result is notable for treating uncertainty generation and hardware variation as first-class circuit problems rather than software post-processing.
summary.zh: 这款65 nm存算一体芯片执行多模态贝叶斯推理，用于完全端侧的皮肤病变筛查。其免校准高斯随机数发生器达到16.3 fJ/样本和168.6 GSa/s/mm²；高斯混合采样使等风险覆盖率提升1.4倍、工艺波动鲁棒性提升5.5倍。该工作将不确定性生成与硬件波动视为核心电路问题，而非依赖软件后处理，这是其主要价值。

title.en: EDA & Design Automation
title.zh: EDA与设计自动化

title.en: One-Pass Neural Optimization for Pre-Layout Signal Integrity
title.zh: 用于布局前信号完整性的单次神经优化

papers.authors: J. Withöft, W. John, E. Ecik, et al.

summary.en: The paper proposes amortized neural optimization for pre-layout signal-integrity exploration, replacing repeated black-box searches with a learned policy that emits near-optimal design parameters in one deterministic forward pass. The policy is trained from analytical gradients through a differentiable surrogate and evaluated on three complex SI scenarios. The approach could make multi-corner sweeps substantially cheaper, although its practical value depends on how well the surrogate and policy generalize beyond their training space.
summary.zh: 论文提出用于布局前信号完整性探索的摊销神经优化，以学习到的策略替代反复黑盒搜索，并通过一次确定性前向计算给出近似最优设计参数。该策略利用可微代理模型的解析梯度训练，并在三个复杂SI场景中验证。它有望显著降低多工况扫描成本，但实际价值仍取决于代理模型与策略能否泛化到训练空间之外。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: Training a 120B Sparse MoE on One Eight-GPU Node
title.zh: 在单个八GPU节点训练120B稀疏MoE

summary.en: LightningLM 0.1V grows a dense seed through 5B and 9B stages into a 120B sparse MoE with 460 routed experts and top-12 routing, all on a single eight-GPU node. Only 5.93B of 118.67B stored parameters are active, and reversible recurrence reconstructs activations during backpropagation to control memory. This is explicitly a systems experience report, so its value lies in reproducible scaling disciplines and failure modes rather than a broad claim of frontier model quality.
summary.zh: LightningLM 0.1V从稠密种子模型逐步扩展，经5B与9B阶段形成120B稀疏MoE，包含460个路由专家并采用top-12路由，整个流程均在单个八GPU节点完成。118.67B存储参数中仅5.93B处于激活状态，可逆递归结构在反向传播时重建激活值以控制内存。论文明确定位为系统经验报告，其价值在于可复现的扩展方法与失败案例，而非宣称达到前沿模型质量。

title.en: AI Models & Inference Systems
title.zh: AI模型与推理系统

title.en: Sparsely Gated Single-Neuron Experts
title.zh: 稀疏门控的单神经元专家

summary.en: The work shrinks each MoE expert to a single linear neuron and activates only a small fraction of a large expert pool. In isoflop comparisons, replacing Transformer feed-forward layers with these sparsely gated linear neurons improves language-model perplexity across compute budgets. The linear and highly sparse circuits also expose semantically structured expert clusters, though the evidence is still based on relatively small interpretability studies.
summary.zh: 该工作将每个MoE专家缩小为单个线性神经元，并只激活大规模专家池中的极少部分。在等FLOP比较中，用这种稀疏门控线性神经元替换Transformer前馈层，可在不同算力预算下改善语言模型困惑度。其线性、高稀疏电路还呈现语义结构化的专家簇，但可解释性证据目前仍主要来自小规模实验。

title.en: A CPU-Bound Breakdown of vLLM Cold Starts
title.zh: vLLM冷启动的CPU瓶颈分析

papers.authors: H. S. Kabakibo, A. Trivedi, L. Wang

summary.en: This study decomposes vLLM startup into six stages and finds that cold-start latency is predominantly CPU-bound, including in newer configurations using the V1 API and torch.compile. The authors derive an analytical model that predicts startup time for a given hardware configuration and release their profiling data and tools. The result matters for autoscaling and serverless inference, where model execution speed does not compensate for slow process initialization.
summary.zh: 该研究将vLLM启动过程拆分为六个阶段，发现冷启动延迟主要受CPU限制，包括采用V1 API与torch.compile的新配置。作者进一步建立可根据硬件配置预测启动时间的解析模型，并开放分析数据与工具。该结果对自动扩缩容和无服务器推理尤为重要，因为模型运行再快也无法抵消缓慢的进程初始化。

title.en: Predictive Shortest-Job Scheduling for Serial LLM Backends
title.zh: 面向串行LLM后端的预测式最短作业调度

summary.en: Clairvoyant is a sidecar proxy that predicts response length and applies shortest-job-first scheduling to serial OpenAI-compatible backends such as Ollama and llama.cpp. Its XGBoost predictor uses 19 lexical features and adds 0.029 ms per request, targeting head-of-line blocking without the KV-cache memory cost of continuous batching. Ranking accuracy falls from 62-96% in-distribution to 52-66% across distributions, so robustness to workload shift remains the key caveat.
summary.zh: Clairvoyant是一个sidecar代理，通过预测响应长度并采用最短作业优先调度，为Ollama和llama.cpp等串行OpenAI兼容后端缓解队首阻塞。其XGBoost预测器使用19个词法特征，每个请求仅增加0.029 ms开销，同时避免连续批处理带来的KV-cache内存成本。排序准确率从分布内的62%至96%下降到跨分布的52%至66%，因此对工作负载变化的鲁棒性仍是主要限制。

title.en: Quantum Computing
title.zh: 量子计算

title.en: QBugLM Benchmarks LLM Agents on Quantum Software Debugging
title.zh: QBugLM评测LLM智能体的量子软件调试能力

papers.authors: A. B. B. Pham, H. T. Nguyen, M. Usman

summary.en: QBugLM automates bug injection, LLM-based detection and repair, and simulation validation for framework-agnostic OpenQASM 3.0 programs. In tests with Claude 4.6 Sonnet and Qwen3 Coder Next, one retry raises Pass@1 from below 25% to above 80%, and simple structured prompts can outperform Chain-of-Thought and ReAct under fixed resources. The large retry effect also shows why quantum-debugging benchmarks must validate repaired programs rather than trust first-pass textual explanations.
summary.zh: QBugLM面向框架无关的OpenQASM 3.0程序，自动执行缺陷注入、基于LLM的检测与修复，以及仿真验证。在Claude 4.6 Sonnet与Qwen3 Coder Next测试中，增加一次重试可将Pass@1从低于25%提升至80%以上；在固定资源下，简单结构化提示甚至可优于Chain-of-Thought与ReAct。重试带来的巨大增益也说明，量子调试评测必须验证修复后的程序，而不能只相信首轮文字解释。
